items.name: Romastor 360°
items.description: 360 degree continuous panning horizontal rotation for uninterrupted, flowing camera movement.
items.long_description: The Romastor 360° delivers continuous, uninterrupted horizontal rotation — ideal for sweeping reveals, follow shots and dynamic camera moves that never need to reset. Engineered in-house and certified for set, it mounts across our full fleet of Manitou and Magni rotating telehandlers.

items.name: Romastor Pan & Tilt
items.description: 360 degree horizontal rotation with tilt up to 70 degrees for dynamic, versatile shot composition.
items.long_description: Combining full horizontal rotation with up to 70 degrees of tilt, the Romastor Pan & Tilt opens up compound camera moves in a single attachment. Pan and tilt independently or together for complex, choreographed shots — fully interchangeable across the fleet.

items.name: Romastor 3D
items.description: Dual axis 360 degree rotation across both horizontal and vertical planes for total spatial freedom.
items.long_description: The flagship of the Romastor range. Dual-axis 360 degree rotation across both horizontal and vertical planes gives effectively spherical freedom of movement — the most versatile motion attachment we build, for shots that defy a fixed plane.

items.name: Rotator
items.description: Vertical rotating attachment with continuous 360 degree movement in either direction.
items.long_description: A dedicated vertical rotating attachment offering continuous 360 degree movement in either direction. Purpose-built for vertical reveals, barrel rolls and rigging applications that demand smooth, unbroken rotation under load.

items.name: Magni Panning Head
items.description: Single axis 180 degree movement, perfectly suited to our range of Manitou MRT telehandlers.
items.long_description: A single-axis panning attachment with 180 degrees of smooth horizontal movement, matched specifically to the Magni and Manitou MRT range. A reliable, no-fuss panning solution for productions that need clean horizontal motion without complexity.

items.name: Alpha Truss
items.description: Specialist trussing and truss attachments for complex rigging, lighting and structural work.
items.long_description: The Alpha Truss system provides specialist trussing and truss attachments for complex rigging, lighting and structural builds. Designed and fabricated in-house, it adapts to the most demanding set requirements where standard rigging won't reach.

items.name: Manitou MRT 2660 E
items.description: Electric slewing telehandler — 6 tonne capacity, 26 metre reach. Silent, emission-free operation for interior and sensitive sets.
items.long_description: The fully electric MRT 2660 E pairs a 6 tonne capacity and 26 metre reach with silent, zero-emission operation — making it the go-to for interior shoots, sound-sensitive sets and enclosed locations where a diesel machine simply can't work.

items.name: Manitou MRT 2660
items.description: Rotating telehandler with 6 tonne capacity and 26 metre reach — the workhorse of the fleet.
items.long_description: The workhorse of the fleet. The MRT 2660 rotating telehandler delivers 6 tonnes of capacity and 26 metres of reach with a 360 degree turret, handling the full spectrum of lifting, placement and rigging tasks across feature, TVC and series productions.

items.name: Manitou MRT 2150
items.description: Compact rotating telehandler — 5 tonne capacity, 21 metre reach. Versatile in limited-access environments.
items.long_description: A more compact rotating telehandler offering 5 tonnes of capacity and 21 metres of reach. Its smaller footprint makes it the versatile choice for limited-access environments and tighter set conditions without sacrificing rotating capability.

items.name: Magni TH6.20
items.description: Fixed-frame telehandler engineered for reliability and reach across film and construction applications.
items.long_description: The Magni TH6.20 is a fixed-frame telehandler delivering 6 tonnes of capacity and around 20 metres of reach. Dependable and straightforward, it covers everyday lifting and placement across film and construction applications.

items.name: Magni TH 5.5 19
items.description: Fixed-frame Magni telehandler — dependable lifting and placement for everyday production needs.
items.long_description: A fixed-frame Magni telehandler rated to roughly 5.5 tonnes and 19 metres of reach. A dependable everyday machine for lifting and placement where a rotating turret isn't required.

items.name: Silenced Generators
items.description: Low-noise diesel generators for powering sets, lighting and equipment without disrupting sound.
items.long_description: Low-noise diesel generators that power lighting, equipment and entire sets without intruding on sound recording. Available across a range of outputs to suit everything from a single rig to a full unit base.

items.name: Hi-Flow Diesel Air Compressors
items.description: High-flow diesel air compressors for special effects, pneumatics and rigging applications.
items.long_description: High-flow diesel air compressors supplying the volume needed for special effects, pneumatic rigs and rigging applications. Reliable air on demand for the most air-hungry set requirements.

items.name: Track Matts
items.description: Heavy-duty track matts for safe machine access and ground protection across difficult terrain.
items.long_description: Heavy-duty track matts that create safe, stable machine access while protecting sensitive ground and surfaces. Essential for moving telehandlers and plant across grass, sand and uneven terrain.

items.name: Prime Mover & Transport
items.description: Float and prime mover transport for moving telehandlers, attachments and plant to and from set.
items.long_description: Float and prime mover transport for moving telehandlers, attachments and plant safely to and from set. Logistics handled end to end so your equipment arrives ready to work.

items.name: Crew & Support Vehicles
items.description: Support vehicles to keep crew, tools and parts moving across large or remote production sites.
items.long_description: Support vehicles that keep crew, tools and spare parts moving across large or remote production sites — minimising downtime when every minute on set counts.

items.name: Design & Engineering
items.description: Structural engineers and designers with 100+ years combined film experience, building the solution that's right for your production.
items.long_description: Our in-house designers and structural engineers bring over 100 years of combined film experience to every brief. From concept to certified solution, we design custom rigs, adaptions and attachments built specifically around your production's needs.

items.name: Laser & Plasma Cutting
items.description: Full bed and tube laser cutting plus plasma facilities — precision fabrication in steel and aluminium.
items.long_description: A complete fabrication capability — full bed and tube laser cutting alongside plasma cutting facilities. Precision work in steel and aluminium, all under one roof in our Botany workshop, supporting both our own builds and custom client jobs.

items.name: Motion Control
items.description: Gimbals, winches and automated control systems for almost any in-camera film requirement.
items.long_description: Gimbals, winches and automated control systems engineered for almost any in-camera requirement. Our motion control specialists deliver repeatable, frame-accurate movement for the most demanding shots.

items.name: Rigging Services
items.description: Lighting, stunts and special effects rigging — designed, certified and crewed by specialists.
items.long_description: Specialist rigging for lighting, stunts and special effects — designed, certified and crewed by our experienced team. Safety-first solutions for the most ambitious set-ups, manned by people who've worked across every department.
